# Pull Request Template

## Summary
Describe the purpose of this PR and the user impact.

## Changes
- 

## Testing
- How did you test this change locally?

## Checklist
- [ ] No UI regressions (visual spot-check)
- [ ] No content loss
- [ ] Lighthouse Mobile diff >= 0 or unchanged
- [ ] Axe: 0 critical issues
- [ ] SEO: canonical + JSON-LD present (if relevant)
- [ ] CORS/Rate-limit (if function changed)
- [ ] Updated TASKS.md + CHANGELOG.md
